metadata.description: Practical AI plugins for job searching and learning. Built by Dylan Thomas.

plugins.name: jfm
plugins.description: An AI-powered job search agent that learns what roles you'd actually take, finds them, assesses fit, and prepares you for interviews.

plugins.name: tmb
plugins.description: A Claude Code curriculum builder. Interviews you about your goal, researches the topic once up-front, designs a hands-on module sequence, then dispatches parallel module-builders that share canonical sources. Ships a local Hugo site with exercises, validation, and a deterministic consistency reviewer.
